subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath spoken forth the Most Exalted Word in the Kingdom of creation, and when His sweetest call was raised aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بالکلمه العلیا فی ملکوت الانشاء فلما ارتفع ندآئه الاحلی
